attack_pattern.description: 消退 → 眼部激光 → 加大力度 → repeat
Always uses 无
Always uses 致命射击
Swing 1 → Swing 2 → 大力挥舞 → repeat
Always uses 启动
Always uses 啃咬
撕扯 → 强化 → Thrash2 → repeat
Starts with 头槌
Always uses 殴打
沉睡 → 苏醒 → 斩击 → repeat
飞扑 → 啄击 → repeat
Always uses 念咒
跺地 → 横冲直撞 → repeat
撕扯 → 巨化打击 → 虫蛰 → 适应 → 戒备打击 → repeat
蓄能 → 重复轰击 → Repeater Blast Move 2 → 排出 → repeat
Always uses 念咒
Always uses 禁忌唱诵
Always uses 蜜——蜂——！
then random: 忙乱 (no repeat), 啃食 (no repeat); then conditional: 忙乱 (if in first slot) / 啃食 (if in second slot) / 激怒 (if in third slot) / Rand (if in fourth slot)
Always uses 牵制
then random: 组装, 组装打击; then conditional: Rand (if can fabricate) / 瓦解 (if cannot fabricate)
Starts with 顺走

encounters.encounter_name: 穿着一件大衣的两只地精

attack_pattern.description: Always uses 醒来
Starts with 撞击
Starts with 虚幻孢子, then random: Swipe Random (no repeat, 40%), Headbutt (no repeat, 60%)
Starts with 缠上
Starts: 吐舌 → 惩恶一击 → 为了女王; then conditional: 吐舌 (if HasBeetleCharged || CurrentHp >= MaxHp / 2) / 甲虫冲锋 (if !HasBeetleCharged && CurrentHp < MaxHp / 2)
Always uses First Acid Goop
Always uses 爆炸
电击掌 → 生成闪电 → Galvanic Burst → repeat

Starts with 嫩化黏液
刺击 → 辐射 → 旋风 → 脉动 → repeat
Starts: 旋风 → 刺击; then random: 刺击, 旋风 (no repeat); then random: 锐利凝视 (no repeat), 旋风 (no repeat)
力量之舞 → 快斩 → 回旋镖 → repeat
脆弱法球 → 虚弱法球 → 灵魂光束 → 黑暗仪式 → repeat
Starts: 知识的诅咒 → 抽打 → 知识过载 → 思考; then conditional: 知识的诅咒 (if curse of knowledge counter < 3) / 抽打 (if curse of knowledge counter >= 3)
Starts with 沉睡
黏糊射击 → 团块射击 → repeat
先进毒气 → 膨胀 → 超级毒气爆炸 → repeat
Starts with 盾击; then conditional: 盾击 (if has allies) / 砸击 (if no allies)
Always uses 吐网炮
强力护盾 → 抑制 → 撞击 → Prep → 魔法炸弹 → repeat
Starts with 爪击; then random: 狂乱撕扯 (no repeat), 怒吼 (once), 爪击 (no repeat)
冲锋 → 喷火器 → 举起蓄力 → 重斩 → repeat
then conditional: 浓毒 (if in first slot) / 吸吮 (if in second slot)
then conditional: 顶撞 (if alone) / 哈气 (if not in front) / Slice (if in front)
Always uses 噪音
Starts: 产卵 → 猛砸 → 嫩化; then conditional: 产卵 (if can lay) / 高营养糊糊 (if cannot lay)
法官审查 → 猛啄袭击 → 飞法行为 → 裁决 → repeat
Always uses 砸击
then conditional: 猛晃 (if in first slot) / 啃咬 (if in second slot) / 甩动 (if in third slot) / 变大 (if in fourth slot)
Starts: 感染 → 甩动

Starts: Puppet Strings → 你是我的了; then conditional: 为我尽力燃烧吧 (if does not have amalgam died) / 将头砍下 (if has amalgam died); then conditional: 为我尽力燃烧吧 (if does not have amalgam died) / 将头砍下 (if has amalgam died)
